title: rhus aromatica var. serotina
intro: Rhus aromatica var. serotina, also known as Fragrant Sumac, is a plant species belonging to the Anacardiaceae family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rhus aromatica var. serotina include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
